_meta.description: Deep analysis of all GoCreate JavaScript files - AJAX endpoints, data structures, form IDs, hidden inputs, and wizard step breakdown

OrderCreationTypes.note: hiddenOrderCreationType can also be 3 (admin BM order)

ItemTypeCategories.note: passed to GetNewGuid for GUID routing

enums.IMPOSSIBLE_VALIDATION_TYPE_WARNINGS: referenced as constant in SubmitPrimaryInfo callback

global_variables.RunningInformation: JSON serialized RunningInformation object for right panel
global_variables.ItemDetails: JSON serialized ItemDetails object for item details popup
global_variables.TOTAL_STEP: Total wizard steps, default 7 (can be 6 if branding hidden)
global_variables.testGarmentSelected: Boolean flag for test garment selection
global_variables.CopyTrouserSmokingColor: Boolean for trouser smoking color copy

response.MessageHtml: string - HTML for the wizard step panel

custom_order_wizard.description: Navigate backwards to a previous wizard step
Navigate to a step for editing
Update running information panel with remarks
Save entire custom order with user-provided name
Apply calculated body measurement values from BM calculator
Save current step data before saving as draft

custom_order_wizard.source: CopyOrder.js - used everywhere for session routing
custom_order_wizard.description: Get new GUID for order session routing - prepended to URLs as /g/{guid}/...
Redirect to create new order for same customer

response.MessageHtml: string - next step HTML or error HTML

wizard_step_form_submissions.description: Submit primary info form (product combination, fabric, model, occasion, quantity)
Submit fit & try-on selections (fit profile, try-on sizes)
Submit design option selections (per product part tab)
Final submission - process or hold order

copy_order_endpoints.for: Moss Bros copy CM order redirect

customer_endpoints.response: HTML string (product line/item type selection popup)

order_overview_endpoints.response: HTML or { status: false, message: string }

other_endpoints.response: JSON object of localized key-value pairs

wizard_forms.#frmPrimaryInfo: Step 1 - Primary Information form (product combination, fabric, model, occasion, quantity, SPP selections)
wizard_forms.#Form{ActiveProductTab}: Step 4 - Design Options form (dynamic, one per product part tab, e.g. #FormProductPartName1)

customer_forms.#CustomerForm: Customer create/edit form (made ajax with ajaxForm)

wizard_state.#HideFitAndTryOn: boolean - hide fit & try-on step from wizard
wizard_state.#HideFitTools: boolean - hide fit tools step from wizard
wizard_state.#hdnHideBrandingOptions: 1 or 0 - hide branding options step (reduces TOTAL_STEP to 6)
wizard_state.#HideFitAndTryOnStepInCopyOrder: boolean - hide fit step in copy mode
wizard_state.#HideFitToolsStepInCopyOrder: boolean - hide fit tools step in copy mode
wizard_state.#ActiveProductTab: string - current product part tab name (e.g. 'ProductPartName1')
wizard_state.#OrderCopyEachComponent: boolean - copy all components and skip to finalize

product_combination.#hdnProductCombinationCanCreateBMOrder: 0 or 1 - can this combination create BM orders
product_combination.#AllowedCombinationsForTestGarment: string - allowed combinations for test garment
product_combination.#JacketSppIdForTestGarment: int - jacket SPP ID for test garment
product_combination.#TrouserSppIdForTestGarment: int - trouser SPP ID for test garment

customer.#customerId: int - customer ID for order creation

fit_tool_settings.#SelectedProductPartID: int - selected product part for fit tool search

primary_info.Spp_{partIndex}_{slotIndex}: Dynamic SPP selection per product part per quantity slot

dyo_order.#DDLDyoModel_{part}: DYO model/make selection per product part

design_option_settings.#dd_{designOptionId}: Default value dropdown per design option

what_happens: Validates primary info screen via ValidatePrimaryInfoScreen()
Checks test garment constraints (IsTestGarmentAvailable)
If new order + BM-capable combination + type not selected: shows #divOrderCreationSelection dialog (TryOn vs BM)
If draft order: submits with validation
Sends form data via ajaxForm to server (collects all SPP selections, fabric, model, etc.)
Server responds with next step HTML or validation errors
On success: calls ChangeWizardStep() which replaces #divOrderCreationMainPanel with new HTML
conditional_logic: BM order creation type: shows body measurement calculator option

what_happens: Collects product part IDs from #tblFitAndTryOn
Checks each part's fit advise dropdown (#ddFitAdvise_{partId})
If fitAdvise==2 (copy from previous): shows new FP creation section
Otherwise submits form with validation
Server returns next step HTML
If BM order (creationType==2) or admin BM (creationType==3): tab labeled 'Measurement'
Otherwise labeled 'FitTool'
Submits fit tool measurements form
Validation can be skipped in copy/edit mode (except for design options step)
Uses tabbed panel per product part (e.g. ProductPartName1, ProductPartName2)
Each tab has its own form with design option dropdowns
Design options have internal names like JBU, TBU, WBU, SBU (buttons), JPP, MPP (piping), ML1L2
Submits active tab's form
data_attributes_on_options: data-extradays: extra production days for this option value
data-rprice: retail price addition for this option value

what_happens: Can be hidden entirely via #hdnHideBrandingOptions==1
Branding groups selected via #drpbgroup_{index} dropdowns
If test garment selected: removes option values 2 and 3 from drpbgroup_1
Shows caution messages via ShowHideSelectAllCautionMessageCheckboxes()
Submits summary form with caution message acknowledgments
Disables caution message checkboxes
Can submit to process order (isProcessOrder=true) or save on hold
For draft orders: shows #divIsSendMailToAm dialog asking about AM notification
Draft save flow: DraftOrderSubmit() -> DraftSubmit() -> /CustomOrder/SaveDraftOrder
On success: shows final message dialog with redirect options

dyo_order_flow.description: Single-page order for DYO (Design Your Own) products
flow: 2. Server returns PrimaryInfoViewModel -> initializes style, fit profile, fit tools, design options, branding

running_info_calculation.note: Highest extra days across all components determines delivery date

steps: 2. GET /Customer/HasShopMultipleProductLine/ -> checks if shop has multiple product lines
3. If hasMultiplePL: ShowProductLineSelectionPopUp() -> GET /Customer/SelectOrder/ -> shows item type selection dialog
4. User selects item type + product line from radio buttons
6. Server responds with RefreshURL -> redirect to order creation page
1. OnCopyClick() called with orderID, orderType, shopType, productLineInternalName
3. GetNewGuid() -> GET /CustomOrder/GetNewGuid to get session GUID
4. Build copy URL based on orderType + productLine (see copy_order_endpoints)
5. GET copy URL with orderID and isCancelledAndRemakeOrder flag
6. Server returns { status, Msg (HTML for copy selection dialog) }
7. For DYO orders: skip dialog, redirect directly to copy page
8. For CM/MTM/MTO: show copy dialog with checkboxes for each component to copy
10. CopyEachComponentAndSubmit() checks all components and submits (go to finalize)

copy_components_form.special_handling: For cancel-and-remake: CopyFabric and CopyLining checkboxes are excluded from SelectAll

product_part_ids_observed.26: Coat with detachable liner (triggers auto-copy to part 27)

CopyOrder.js: OnCopyClick(orderID, orderType, copyOrderHeaderText, canHideCopyAllButton, shopType, productLineInternalName, itemTypeCategory)
OnEditOrderClick(orderID, orderType, shopType, productLineInternalName, itemTypeCategory, isCallFromOrderDetail)

important_div_containers.#divOrderCreationMainPanel: Main wizard content area - replaced on each step change
important_div_containers.#divOrderCreationSelection: Order creation type selection dialog (TryOn vs BM)
important_div_containers.#divFitToolContainer_{productPartId}: Fit tool container per product part
important_div_containers.#OrderSummaryCheckbox: DYO order summary confirmation checkbox dialog

navigation_urls./CustomOrder/CreateOrderForSameCustomer: Create new order for same customer
navigation_urls./DyoOrder/CreateOrderForSameCustomer: Create new DYO order for same customer
